creator: gja822@narod.ru
text:
Thank you for the reply. Looks reasonable. For now I could live without oyranos in cinepaint.

(All I need is a support for more than 8-bit channel depths in pictures and support for DICOM format (used in tomorgaphs for example) and optional ICC profiles support. And cinepaint was the first (and the only known by me for now) that I've found.)
